Case Study • Various

How we helped APackaging Group LLC Awarded EcoVadis Platinum Medal, Among the Top 1% of Companies Globally

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

APackaging Group LLC, a global leader in innovative and sustainable packaging solutions, has been awarded the prestigious EcoVadis Platinum Medal**,** placing it in the top 1% of more than 130,000 companies assessed worldwide by EcoVadis — the leading global standard for business sustainability ratings.

This Group-level Platinum recognition validates APackaging Group’s unwavering commitment to Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) excellence across its operations. The Group achieved a balanced and outstanding performance in all four EcoVadis assessment pillars:

Environment: 80/100

Labour & Human Rights: 80/100

Ethics: 80/100

Sustainable Procurement: 80/100

With an overall score of 80/100 and placement in the 99th percentile globally, this milestone represents a major validation of APackaging Group’s responsible business practices and global ESG alignment. The success was made possible through a structured sustainability roadmap developed in collaboration with Growlity, Inc., a globally trusted ESG and sustainability consulting firm.

Ms. Helga Arminak, CEO, APackaging Group LLC, said:
“We are honored to receive the EcoVadis Platinum Medal — a reflection of our Group’s long-standing commitment to sustainability, ethics, and innovation. This recognition underscores the dedication of our global teams. We thank Growlity, Inc. for their strong partnership and strategic support throughout this journey.”

Mr. Don Stover, Director of Corporate Quality, APackaging Group LLC, stated:
“This Group-level recognition has helped us align, refine, and unify our ESG efforts across all business units and geographies. Working closely with Growlity, Inc. helped us elevate our sustainability governance and global disclosures. We’re proud of this collective achievement.”

Dr. Nitin Dumasia, President & CEO,
Growlity, Inc. USA
“APackaging Group’s Platinum rating demonstrates the strength of vision, leadership, and disciplined ESG execution across the Group. It was a privilege to work with their teams to help embed international sustainability standards and deliver measurable impact. Their recognition is well-deserved.”

Mr. Prabhat Pant, Vice President, Global Business Development, Growlity, Inc. USA
“Leading this Group-level project with APackaging Group was a rewarding experience. Their cooperation and strong sustainability focus made this EcoVadis Platinum recognition a true reflection of their global responsibility and future-forward vision.”

About APACKAGING GROUP LLC

APackaging Group LLC is a globally integrated packaging company, specializing in sustainable, high-performance, and innovative solutions for the beauty, personal care, and consumer product industries. With a commitment to excellence and responsible business, the Group serves leading brands across multiple international markets.

About Growlity

Growlity is a globally trusted ESG and sustainability advisory firm operating in 25+ countries. Growlity supports organizations with solutions across EcoVadis, CDP, BRSR, CBAM, LCA, PCF, and other global sustainability frameworks. The firm’s mission is to drive measurable ESG impact, transparency, and competitive advantage for businesses worldwide
